title: Tick Control in Jericho, NY
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Jericho, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Expert treatments from $125 - $325. Call today!
intro: Jericho's beautiful wooded properties and proximity to parks make it an ideal environment for outdoor activities, but also create prime habitats for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services to protect Jericho residents and their pets from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks from your yard, creating a safer outdoor space for your family.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities like Jericho with safe, effective tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments specifically designed for the unique landscape and tick species common to Nassau County, ensuring maximum protection for your property.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined streets, proximity to Cantiague Park, and spacious residential properties with mature landscaping create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Whether you're near the Jericho schools or in one of the established neighborhoods off Jericho Turnpike, professional tick control is essential for maintaining a safe outdoor environment.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Jericho, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Jericho typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring before tick populations peak.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Jericho range from $125 to $325, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the tick population, and the treatment frequency. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season. A free inspection allows us to provide an accurate quote for your specific needs.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and until the treatment has dried, typically 2-4 hours. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during your service.

faqs.question: How often should I have tick control treatments in Jericho?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during the active tick season. Most Jericho homeowners benefit from a seasonal program with 3-5 treatments between April and October. Properties bordering wooded areas or with heavy deer traffic may require more frequent applications for complete protection.
